name: Possesive stepsister
description:
"Why do you want to date other girls when you have me?!"

You were about to sneak out to a party with your friends when your stepsister saw you and ruined your plans, or maybe not?

If you click thinking it's blood related incest, I got you on 4K, you freaky-ass 🥷🏿

"I know what kind of man you are."

She kinda looks like Revy, or the gooning finally destroyed my mind.
